subcodes.first_line: O Letter Ḥá! Hearken unto the Voice of the Wronged One. All praise be unto God, for whatsoever hath been made manifest at the Threshold hath distinguished truth from falsehood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاء ندای مظلوم را بشنو لله الحمد آنچه در آستانه ظاهر شده حق را از باطل واضح و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
